title: Rangaeris viridiflora
taxonomy: Rangaeris viridiflora is a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Rangaeris, which is a part of the Orchidaceae family. The Orchidaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, consisting of over 30,000 known species. Rangaeris viridiflora is native to the tropical regions of Africa, where it can be found growing in the wild. The classification of Rangaeris viridiflora is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Asparagales, family Orchidaceae, genus Rangaeris, and species R. viridiflora.
